lint.command: source .venv/bin/activate && ruff check src/ tests/ && source .venv/bin/activate && black --check src/ tests/

blockingIssues.description: The reviewed implementation commit `de16738` only introduces mission scaffolding files and makes no changes to the feature's scoped parser contract, schema, or test surfaces, so the handoff's implementation claim is unsupported by the diff.

`src/rlcoach/events/kickoffs.py:118` hardcodes parser-marker kickoff roles to `BACK`, which makes parser-only kickoff output schema-valid but semantically wrong whenever a parser kickoff marker is emitted without a heuristic merge match.

`parsers/rlreplay_rust/src/lib.rs:1139` suppresses later valid touches from the same actor after the first emission, so the shipped parser-authored touch stream is incomplete and not stable enough for authoritative downstream consumption.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten rust-parser-worker enforcement around test-first workflow and require reviewers/workers to call out when a feature is already pre-satisfied instead of attaching an unrelated commit to the feature handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `freeze-parser-contract-foundation` reported `followedProcedure: true` and linked commit `de16738`, but the diff only adds mission scaffolding and shows no parser/schema/test changes for the claimed feature implementation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify rust-parser-worker scope guidance for parser-contract work that may require downstream event-shaping changes outside `parsers/rlreplay_rust/` and `src/rlcoach/parser/`, or explicitly require orchestrator escalation when the first failing surface is downstream.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `complete-rust-cli-contract-and-runtime-modes` used the rust-parser-worker skill but fixed a failure in `src/rlcoach/events/kickoffs.py`, outside the skill's documented owned-file scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require targeted regression coverage for parser-contract bug fixes discovered via manual CLI validation, especially for authoritative event emission semantics and parser-marker role shaping.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `complete-rust-cli-contract-and-runtime-modes` and `emit-parser-authoritative-events-and-consistency-contract` changed runtime behavior without adding focused regression tests for the exact bug surfaces later caught in scrutiny.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a standalone typecheck command to services.yaml for parser-contract scrutiny.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this repo's milestone manifest currently defines test, lint, format, Rust build/test, corpus-health, and CLI checks, but no factual standalone typecheck command was established during this scrutiny run.
